title: Agentic Workspace Context Gap
description: Task-relevant coverage or population gap derived from declared AW input consumers and existing findings.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for context coverage and population gaps.

id.description: Stable gap identity derived from gap class and surface.

surface.description: AW-consumed surface or surface class affected by the gap.

affected_capability.description: AW capability weakened by the gap.

affected_decisions.description: Specific routing, ownership, proof, continuation, or claim decisions affected.

evidence_refs.description: Existing findings, declarations, or files that prove the gap.

severity.description: Whether the gap blocks the current decision or remains advisory.

current_task_effect.description: How this gap changes the current task decision or claim boundary.

owner.description: Surface or role that owns resolving the gap.

next_route.description: Smallest bounded route to resolve or disposition the gap.
